programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: A un hombre enojado le cuesta aceptar la verdad. Los oficiales cuestionan a unas personas reservadas queriendo confirmar sus sospechas. Papá y mamá se ponen violentos y los niños llaman a la policía.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Los oficiales vienen al rescate cuando un hombre afligido toca fondo. Un hombre comienza una guerra de comida. Los agentes capturan a un hombre desprevenido mientras inspeccionan un estacionamiento.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado se queja de dolor en el pecho después de golpear a un conductor. Una mujer se enoja por una bolsa de papas picante. Un hombre violento por fin aprende cual es el límite de su novia.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Supuestos ladrones de joyas intentan escapar durante una persecución a alta velocidad. El arresto de un hombre peleonero es un reto. Hay pelea matrimonial cuando una parada revela artículos ilegales.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un fugitivo desesperadamente decide huir a pie. Una novia sobreprotectora duda de la policía y la esposan. Un celoso pierde a la novia y más después de buscar pleito con el hijo.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre de delito reincidente lleva a la policía por un camino rugoso. Un oficial aconseja a dos adolescentes en un auto estacionado. Unos oficiales le cuentan el secreto a una mujer de su hermano.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Este episodio examina casos de envenenamiento y químicos mortales, y muestra cómo los expertos forenses resuelven muertes misteriosas de hoy y del pasado.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Persona desaparecida: aproximadamente 1.8 millones de estadounidenses son reportados como desaparecidos cada año.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El informe forense en el juicio de O. J. Simpson por homicidio: millones de personas vieron por televisión cómo el jurado emitió su veredicto. Orenthal James Simpson fue declarado no culpable de homicidio.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Botánica forense y geología: las plantas ayudan a proporcionar oxígeno y nutrientes para la existencia. El suelo es el abono de la vida. Sin embargo, ambos pueden dar pistas sobre la hora y el lugar de la muerte de una persona.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: The 70's were a decade of extremes for The Stones. They rose to the height of their collective creative prowess, spun downward under stardom's weight, then climbed up again.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: The 80's came to be the most trying decade that the Rolling Stones ever faced. As the world grew closer, the Stones drifted apart. Amidst mid-life crises and solo projects, the Stones almost broke up.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: It was during the 1990's that The Rolling Stones proved once and for all that rock and roll has no boundaries or age limits. They'd surge with fresh wind in their sails and new lands in their sights.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Julie March becomes Ben Matlock’s houseguest at an inopportune time in their relationship. Julie is the prosecuting attorney in a murder case that has Ben defending dance instructor Scott Lazar for the hit-and-run death of his benefactor – and lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the salesman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Jack Cassidy is Orin Kerr, an ex-hoodlum who now controls the largest gambling resort in the western hemisphere as a front for the underworld crime syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is struck on the head and loses his memory while trying to intercept an eight-million-dollar smuggling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork. King Friday is curious about a delivery to X the Owl labelled "Deliver to X the Owl ONLY."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow approaching with his imaginary dog. Robert Troll and his imaginary pet, Gloria, are visiting with Queen Sara. When the Queen departs for a meeting, Gloria disappears into the castle.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by for some sitting down exercises. Prince Tuesday asks Handyman Negri to help bring his ragdoll to life. Corney has made a new (imaginary) umbrella Rockit for Daniel's imaginary friend, Malcolm Apricot Dinko.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats se hacen amigos de un pavo en el día de Acción de Gracias.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.desc: A Tommy le da hipo y Angélica se ofrece a asustarlo para que se le quite. / Cuando llega el otoño, los Rugrats creen que los árboles están enfermos, al ver que las hojas se caen y cambian de color. Tommy encabeza una campaña para curarlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.desc: A look back at Franky’s past reveals the amazing origins of the sea train – and paints a vivid picture of his younger days, spent alongside Iceberg and the legendary shipwright Tom!

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: To acquire the resources to cure a space plague, Kirk must resolve a mining dispute between the cultural elites of the cloud city of Stratos and the miners on the surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock meet Abraham Lincoln and Surak of Vulcan and must battle with some of history's most terrible villains.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, Spock, and McCoy enter a time portal and get stuck in the past on a planet about to be consumed by a nova.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is in danger when Janice Lester, one of Kirk's former lovers, steals his body.

programme.title: Star Trek II: la ira de Khan
programme.desc: Es el siglo XXIII. La Federación Unida de Planetas Enterprise está haciendo maniobras de entrenamiento de rutina, y el almirante James T. Kirk parece resignado al hecho de que esta inspección puede ser la última misión espacial de su carrera.

programme.title: Star Trek: en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando un despiadado genio conocido como Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declara una guerra en solitario contra la Federación, el capitán Kirk, Spock y la intrépida tripulación del U.S.S. Enterprise emprenden la mayor cacería de la historia.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: aquel país desconocido
programme.desc: Después de años de guerra, los imperios de la Federación y los klingon se encuentran al borde de conseguir la paz, cuando una nave klingon casi es destruida por un aparente ataque del Enterprise. Ambos mundos se preparan para un encuentro mortal.

programme.title: Star Trek: en la oscuridad

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Klingon Empire ends its peace treaty with the Federation, Sisko must help Klingon Starfleet officer Worf decide where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Klingon Empire ends its peace treaty with the Federation, Sisko must help Klingon Starfleet officer Worf decide where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Held prisoner by a group under the leadership of rebel Jem'Hadar, Bashir and O'Brien clash over Bashir's desire to help their captors escape Dominion rule.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a tragic accident causes Sisko to vanish before his son's eyes, young Jake begins a lifelong obsession to bring him back.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Forced to bring Dukat along on a personal mission, Kira discovers the real reason her nemesis wants to accompany her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Jadzia Dax must choose between her feelings and the rules of Trill society when she is reunited with the wife of one of Dax's previous hosts.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A fierce battle with the Jem'Hadar leaves the Defiant trapped in a planet's volatile atmosphere.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A mishap sends Quark, Rom, and Nog back in time to Earth in 1947 in Roswell, New Mexico, where military forces mistake them for alien invaders.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kor, a revered Klingon warrior, sets out with Worf and Dax in search of a mythical, ancient artifact they believe has the power to unite the Klingon Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Posing as a 1960's secret agent in a malfunctioning Hootsuite program, Bashir is all that stands between his trapped fellow officers and certain death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Evidence that Changelings are targeting Earth sends Sisko back to his home planet, where he and Odo must prevent--or prepare for--war with the Dominion.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Preparing Earth for war with the Dominion, Sisko, and Odo discover evidence of a Starfleet plot to seize control of the planet from the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo's hidden feelings for Kira interfere with his duty to protect the Bajoran First Minister--who also happens to be attracted to her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A demoted Dukat enlists Kira's aid in regaining his former status in the Cardassian Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with Star Trek, the incredible story of a young crew's maiden voyage onboard the most advanced starship ever created: the U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When a ruthless mastermind, Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declares a one-man war on the Federation, Captain Kirk (Chris Pine), Spock (Zachary Quinto), and the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise set out on their most explosive manhunt of all time.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: On a rescue mission, the USS Enterprise is attacked by Krall, a warlord sworn against the Federation. Crashed on an uncharted world, the crew must join forces with Jaylah, a rebellious alien warrior, to escape and stop Krall from triggering all-out war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander Riker's inability to fall asleep begins to show in other members of the crew in other forms, putting the Enterprise on the trail of a mystery.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When an honor student in the medical field is assigned to the Enterprise in an internship manner, she begins to demonstrate powers of the Q, prompting you-know-who to show up.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An emergency beam out renders four crewmen down to childhood shortly before renegade Ferengi take over the Enterprise and offload the adults.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Holodeck fantasy goes awry, sending Worf and his son into a Wild West showdown with a villain who's a dead ringer for Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data risks Picard and Geordi's lives in order to protect another living machine.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After resigning his command to participate in a dangerous secret mission, Captain Picard is taken hostage by the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While under the command of an unfeeling new captain, the Enterprise attempts to rescue Picard from the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A calculating Sherlock Holmesian character traps Picard and others in a holodeck simulation.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi is enamored with a beautiful and mysterious Starfleet lieutenant accused of murder.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Forced to impersonate a Romulan Intelligence official, Counselor Troi becomes a pivotal part of an elaborate defection scheme.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Picard loses his life in a surprise attack, Q gives him the chance to change his destiny.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf and Data embark on unusual journeys to seek out their fathers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In seeking his father, Worf discovers a prisoner-of-war camp that has evolved into a Klingon/Romulan haven - an Eden where Worf becomes their serpent.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is bombarded with lethal rays, Picard is trapped on board with a band of interstellar thieves.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The pupil becomes the teacher when a Borg drone is born on Voyager and Seven of Nine instructs him in the ways of humanity.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A need to test herself leads Torres down a path of self-destruction.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix balks at telling Naomi that her mother and others have gone missing on an away mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Fifteen years after making a horrible mistake, Kim attempts to rewrite history.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven experiences the Borg version of multiple personality disorder.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres is forced to put her life in the hands of a mortal enemy that uses biochemical secretions to give commands.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris is confined to the Brig after interfering with the affairs of an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway falls for a man who may be using her to take over Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Someone is trying to keep the Doctor from remembering the incidents surrounding a crewmember's death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway and Paris join forces to defeat the evil Doctor Chaotica.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded on a desolate planet with a beautiful female, Tuvok struggles to ignore the emotions his Vulcan master taught him to suppress.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is in serious danger when all of their dreams seem to come true and home seems closer in sight.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: During a mission against the Borg, Seven of Nine is lured back to the Collective.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As the Ori's all out assault. looms closer, lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell and Daniel Jackson race to locate a device that will obliterate the evil enemy once and for all. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As their battle with the Ori continues, the team struggles to reunite and formulate a plan to defeat their enemy. Vala (Claudia Black), still aboard an Ori ship, watches as her newly born child quickly ages and is molded to lead the Ori army.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mission to find a weapon that will defeat their powerful foe, the team finds a planet whose inhabitants were killed by a mysterious illness, and unwittingly fall victim to the illness themselves. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to the Pegasus Galaxy and the city of Atlantis in hopes to find a clue to a weapon that can destroy the Ori. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team makes a pact with an old enemy to fight their common foe, and the results are disastrous. Starring Ben Browder as Lt. Colonel Cameron Mitchell, Christopher Judge as Teal'c, and Amanda Tapping as Lt. Colonel Samantha Carter.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 struggles to control a rash of brutal attacks by an elusive and savage alien creature. Starring Ben Browder as Lt. Col. Mitchell, Amanda Tapping as Lt. Col. Carter, Christopher Judge as Teal'c, and Michael Shanks as Dr. Jackson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A reluctant SG-1 assists Martin Lloyd (guest star Willie Garson) with his feature film script as a cover story to keep the Stargate Program secret. Also starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the Jaffa modify an Ancient device so that it is capable of defeating the Ori, Adria (Morena Baccarin) leads an attack on Dakara. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Vala (Claudia Black) is kidnapped by Trust members acting under the orders of the Goa'uld Athena, an accident causes her to lose all memory of who she is and where she came from. Also starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Cameron Mitchell (Ben Browder) goes undercover to track down the Odyssey, which SG-1 believes was hijacked by the Lucian Alliance. Also starring Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds the planet where they believe the Sangraal is. Forced to forge temporary alliances with Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and Ba'al (guest star Cliff Simon) they undertake a quest to find it. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi does everything she can to stay positive; Darrell finds a unit with some vintage totes, while Gunter plays on Rene's last nerve.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino, Calif., brings out the warrior in Ivy, who goes up against an upstart buyer; Kenny has his eye on a locker that leaves him needing a massage; Lisa angles for a smaller unit but ends up with the catch of the day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Tucked away in his storage Man Cave, Barry Weiss and Kenny sit down with Brandi and the Dotsons to relive old times, find out what they've been doing and gather intelligence, as he plans his return to the auction game.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod takes Brandi to an auction on her birthday; Darrell tries to find another "All Ten" locker; Rene stands his ground to protect his honor; Mary brings in her pal from Texas to put her California counterparts in their place.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along; Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage; Ivy and Ivy Jr. clean up with their locker; Kenny gets some advice from a music legend; Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave sees his profits grow, among other things, in Torrance, Calif.; Mary finds clothes that don't fit her, which turns out to be a good thing; Kenny takes a chance at being an early bird, but winds up looking more like a dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Recently separated, Brandi and Jarrod find themselves at the same auction, and tensions flare; she gets the Laura treatment, and he regresses to his childhood self; Ivy schools Ivy Jr., who needs to find his footing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The King of Montebello can't wait to see what he can drum up this time around; Rene sniffs out a great locker, stepping over the competition to get it; Kenny does his best to fire up his profits; Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tries to reclaim the title of King of Whittier but has trouble amassing any shillings; Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes; Lisa finally graduates to full-fledged buyer, finding an unlikely mentor along the way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Less is mostly more in Brea; Rene swings for the fences on a costly gamble; Brandi has to dig through trash but really puts her heart into it nonetheless; Ivy and Pops clear up confusion over a massive, mysterious mechanism.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to climb his way to success; Kenny tries to honor the history of San Bernardino, Calif., recording a win along the way; Brandi shows her literary prowess volume by volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a regular father and son shootout in Victorville, Calif., as Ivy and Pops try to prove who among them is the most profitable; Brandi's secret weapon lands her more than she bargained for, but luckily Kenny is there to brighten her day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry rolls up to Riverside, Calif., with his own masked bidder, and the two develop a winning strategy; Brandi and Danielle's mystery balls take them to South America... sort of; Rene needs a cleanse after going through his risqué room.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Home Runs and Winning Finds
programme.desc: There are treasures for some and turmoil for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; the bidders find some very rare cardboard and fight over a very tricky locker; Dave makes a Hail Mary bid; Darrell tests his bicycle knowledge.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life. Extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart. Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary. An outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: The 1980s computing boom through the eyes of a visionary, an engineer and a prodigy as they chart the changing culture in Texas' Silicon Prairie.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After surviving a visit from IBM, Joe's team must overcome internal differences and begin the technical feat of building the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Cameron struggle to make Joe's vision a reality while Joe and Bosworth attempt to procure capital to fund the making of the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: As Cameron nears completion of the BIOS, a crisis threatens the project's future and requires all hands on deck to save the machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron bristles under a new manager as Joe and Gordon attempt to procure a key piece of new technology for the computer.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A breakthrough by Cameron places her at odds with Gordon and leaves Joe to make a difficult decision. Hurricane Alicia spurs personal revelations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Future Shellshock!: The Turtles and Splinter suddenly find themselves in a futuristic world of flying cars, multiple atmospheric and gravity zones and a "melting pot" population of humans and aliens. Who's responsible for this mess?

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Obsolete: Hoping to fix the Time Window and return home, the Turtles sneak out with Cody and go to O'Neil Tech. However, Darius sees the guys and wants them away from Cody and in his lab for study!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Home Invasion: Raphael is impatient with the highly automated future - especially when Cody builds the Turtles a fancy new Dojo complete with realistic holographic simulation battle programs.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Headlock Prime: When he sees an ad for a pro-wrestling tournament, a homesick Raph can't resist. But the evening of fun is spoiled when TRIPLE THREAT, a banned wrestler with three bickering heads, crashes the arena.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Playtime's Over: Mikey, obsessed with the video game HELIX goes crackers when he finds out that the sequel is being released. The turtles need a guide to navigate the humongous LEVELLEX MALL and enlist clueless Cody, who enlists street-wise Starlee.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bishop to Knight: The guys are shocked to find that their old archenemy, Agent Bishop, is alive and well in the year 2105. And worse, he's President of the Pan-Galactic Council?!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Night of Sh'Okanabo: When Mikey finds out that Cody has never seen a horror flick, our boisterous movie aficionado drags Cody and his three brothers downtown for a little horror movie festival viewing.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Clash of the Turtle Titans: Mikey is shocked to discover someone has taken over his old superhero persona TURTLE TITAN. Insane with jealousy, Mikey tries to put the kibosh on the 22nd-century imposter.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Fly Me to the Moon: Cody and the Turtles go to the moon in search of a rare lunar alloy. But their quest is cut short when they discover that the Inuwashi Gunjin have been sent there by Darius Dun to make sure that they never come back alive.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Invasion of the Body Jacker: Jammerhead takes identity theft to a whole new level when he gets his hands on the ultimate stealth device—The Bodyjacker! He uses it to take over Darius Dun's body!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Freaks Come Out at Night: After an outing downtown, Mikey starts behaving strangely -- as in super strength, green-slime-spewing strangely. The reason, the Turtles soon discover, is that Mikey has been "implanted" by one of Sh'Okanabo's "gene-seeds".

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bad Blood: There are some new terrapins in town - the Dark Turtles: the psychotic clones of the original TMNT. They can match the boys kick for kick (or in Mikey's case, quip for quip).

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Journal: While rooting around in Cody's Trophy Room, Don, Leo, Mike and Raph come across the old "future history" journal kept by April O'Neil and Casey Jones.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Gaminator: The Turtles get their hands on a prototype game system called "The Gaminator," rumored to be the ultimate gaming experience. They get more than they bargained for when they are digitized and sucked into the game.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Graduation Day: Class of 2105: Splinter is pleased to announce that the Turtles are about to graduate from the ninja rank of Genin to the more advanced rank of Chunin.Everyone is excited until it is made clear that Michelangelo will not be graduating!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Timing is Everything: When Darius Dun and Sh'Okanabo join forces, it can only mean one thing—trouble! Anxious to test out their version of Cody's Time Window, Sh'Okanabo jumps the gun and unleashes a "Time storm" on NYC!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Enter the Jammerhead: Jammerhead busts his way out of prison, looking to even the score with his Turtle Nemeses. Thanks to a newly developed chip, he can download fighter footage) and instantly mimic the moves.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Milk Run: Intergalactic mercenary TORBIN ZIIXX returns and enlists the Turtles' help in smuggling a ship full of humanitarian aid past TRICERATON GANGSTERS. But the Triceratons are obsessed with finding Ziixx.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Fall of Darius Dunn: When Cody uncovers Darius Dunn's secret weapons manufacturing program, he and his uncle have a final showdown over who will ultimately control the vast O'Neil tech empire.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Turtle X-Tinction: Turtle X is on the rampage throughout New Manhattan - but Cody insists he has nothing to do with it. It turns out the fugitive Darius Dun planted a "Trojan Horse" virus in Cody's exo-armor and is now controlling Turtle X.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Race for Glory: The Turtles enter a tricked-out Hovershell in a cross-country road race that pits the latest high tech experimental vehicles against one another.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Head of State: When President Bishop is attacked by mysterious underground monsters, he enlists the help of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. Our fearless green guardians must rescue Bishop before he loses his head to a figure from the Turtles' past.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: DNA is Thicker than Water: Darius comes down hard on the Darks and places the blame squarely on Dark Leo's spiky shoulders. To prove that he is an apt leader Dark Leo devises a plan to destroy the Turtles from within.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Cosmic Completist: Raphael has contempt for Michelangelo's geeky toy collection, but when the leader of the Inawashi Gunjin comes to the Turtles for help with a malevolent alien, Raphael must think like a geek to beat Aramzedo, the ultimate collector!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Day of Awakening: When the entire population of Moonbase Bishop goes missing, it appears that Sh'Okanabo has jump-started his plan to take over the Earth. The Turtles stage an assault on the base, only to find a bigger, badder Sh'Okanabo!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Zixxth Sense: Torbin Zixx convinces the Turtles to help him recover an experimental matter transmitter that he was forced to give to Boss Zukko to pay off a debt. The fate of the world may rest on the success of their mission. But can they trust Zixx?

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Tempus Fugit: When the Time Window is finally repaired, the Turtles enter into it to head home, but instead of finding themselves back in the lair, our heroes find themselves with Viral!

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Bubba Skinner is seduced by a beautiful lady who has taken residence in Sparta in order to write a novel. But when her estranged ex-husband shows up, things become much more complicated, and Bubba is faced with a life-changing decision.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil believes he acted in self-defense when he shoots a robbery suspect. But when the teenage girl's gun cannot be found, suspicions arise, even he begins to doubt his own actions. Chief Bill Gillespie does all he can to clear his detective.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs’s niece and Bubba Skinner's nephew, teenagers from different worlds, find common ground -- and trouble -- in Sparta. Soon the two are swept up with an ex-con recently paroled from prison, and Gillespie is none too happy about it.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) suspects a newly arrived short-order cook in town may be involved in the recent murder of a young prostitute. Virgil (Howard Rollins) thinks otherwise and is out to prove that a local criminal is to blame.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil and his wife, Althea, are invited to attend services at an all-white church. While attending the service, the reverend collapses, dead at the foot of the pulpit. It seems that not everyone was happy with the pastor's integration plan.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: While Walker helps clean up a middle school, Sydney goes undercover as a singer in a nightclub owned by a smuggler.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Sydney rescues a deliberate hit-and-run victim who's carrying a cartridge of nerve gas, but his amnesia puts a hold on his story.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Diplomatic immunity covers a cultural minister's son after he assaults Gage, who overheard him talking about heroin just before the encounter.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers wage war against a gang of Vietnamese gun smugglers who viciously murdered Steven Nimh (Phillip Moon), their friend and an undercover cop. Meanwhile, the Nimh family struggles with their grief.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Rangers go undercover as ranch hands to apprehend the leaders of a notorious drug cartel; Alex and Sydney travel to Mexico to meet with the head of the DEA in Nuevo Laredo.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Conclusion. Walker, Trivette, and Gage race to Mexico to save Alex and Sydney, who have been kidnapped by ruthless drug kingpin Cruz Ortega.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's bachelor retreat turns deadly when the Rangers are pursued by a bloodthirsty bear and a vengeful money launderer (Michael Harney).

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Alex prepare for their wedding day, unaware that a pair of ruthless assassins have been hired to destroy the happy couple.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Susan are on their way to Mount Carmel for a romantic getaway weekend but detour to a fishing town when their car breaks down. They grab a bite at the local diner when Susan sees a man she used to know.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Personal grievances get in the way of detective Harry Trumble's retirement party. Trumble never forgave Dr. Sloan for marrying his college sweetheart and dedicated his life to his work.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.desc: Marisa le dice a Oscar que decidió no involucrar más a Cristóbal en su caso, mientras Cristóbal está enojado por lo que ella dijo en el programa de televisión. Richard alerta a Calixta sobre la cercanía del Polaco. Lalo dona su cabello.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela es una minera que detecta fallas en la seguridad de la mina San Pedro. Antonia, la dueña del lugar, es una despiadada mujer que quiere que su hijo Alejandro se haga cargo del negocio. Gabriela y Alejandro quedan atrapados en un derrumbe.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela son rescatados por Tomás. El padre de la minera ahora está rico y no quiere que ella se arriesgue más en la mina. Alejandro se queda en San Pedro, visita a Gabriela y la ve saliendo de la ducha, provocando los celos de Fernando.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Tomás entrega su renuncia, pero antes, como jefe de los mineros, despide a Gabriela para evitar que muera en otro derrumbe. Ella vuelve a la mina y le pide su trabajo de vuelta a Alejandro. Él acepta, sin poder disimular lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia interroga al pequeño David para saber quién es su padre. Además, quiere investigar si el Tigre ha estado robando oro de su mina. Fernando tiene una horrible pesadilla en la que ve a su madre, la Patrona, asesinando a su padre, Marcos Beltrán.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se aficiona a las apuestas, a Gabriela no le gusta pero acepta bajo presión. Rosario ve a Armando besar a Dínora, él le echa la culpa a ella y se alegra de que su mujer esté celosa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara tiembla porque uno de sus aliados le da la espalda, cuando la noticia que recibe sobre Marisa provoca un giro en sus planes. Oscar no se deja intimidar por la jueza y le recomienda pensar sus acciones. Se vende la primera piedra preciosa.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams are in Liverpool, England, where they experience a once-in-a-lifetime shoot-out at the historic Anfield Stadium, home of the Liverpool FC.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final teams race through Las Vegas, where the world's greatest illusionist, David Copperfield, designs a final challenge that requires the remaining teams to master the art of illusion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven teams take off from Los Angeles, California on race around the world, starting with a stop in Valparaiso, Chile, where a high-wire walk Roadblock tests the mettle of several racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop on the Seychellian island of Praslin and fly to Penang, Malaysia, heading to the Snake Palace.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.desc: Rick and Michonne must find a way to survive.
